criteria.label: API & Integration
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with existing supermarket software stacks and custom fields.

criteria.label: System Latency
criteria.description: Response time for CRM operations to ensure high productivity for the IT team.

criteria.label: TCO
criteria.description: Total cost including licensing, modules, and potential bandwidth/egress fees.

criteria.label: Payment Terms
criteria.description: Alignment of payment terms (e.g., 14 vs 60 days) with internal cash flow.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Strict adherence to GDPR Art. 28 and data processing requirements under German law.

criteria.label: Support SLA
criteria.description: Availability of technical support (e.g., 24/7 vs business hours) and response time guarantees.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Guarantee that data is hosted within Germany or the EU to satisfy legal constraints.

criteria.label: Vendor Stability
criteria.description: Long-term viability of the vendor to support the CRM platform for the software company.
